_comment_integration: See .env.integration.example — copy it to .env.integration (gitignored) and fill in your real service URLs before running: pytest tests/test_integration.py -m integration

cql_libraries.name: ifu_information
cql_libraries.sample_cql:
library ifu_information version '1.0'
using FHIR version '4.0.1'
include FHIRHelpers version '4.0.1' called FHIRHelpers
codesystem "LOINC": 'http://loinc.org'
context Patient
define "ig_death_dx_concept": Concept {Code '79378-6' from "LOINC",Code '92022-3' from "LOINC",Code '76060-3' from "LOINC",Code '69453-9' from "LOINC",Code '76061-1' from "LOINC",Code '69441-4' from "LOINC",Code '92023-1' from "LOINC"} 
define "ig_death":
	case
		when Patient.deceased = true then 'Yes'
		when (Patient.deceased as FHIR.dateTime) is not null then 'Yes'
		when Patient.deceased = false then 'No'
		else 'Unknown'
	end
define "ig_death_dx": [Observation: code ~ "ig_death_dx_concept"]
define "ig_death_dt_dx": from "ig_death_dx" target return ToString((target.effective as FHIR.dateTime).value)
define "ig_death_dt":
	case
		when (Patient.deceased as FHIR.dateTime) is not null then ToString((Patient.deceased as FHIR.dateTime).value)
		when Patient.deceased = false then null
		when Patient.deceased = true then 'Unknown'
		when exists "ig_death_dt_dx" then Combine("ig_death_dt_dx", ',')
		else 'Not Applicable'
	end
define "ig_death_evidence": "ig_death_dx"
define "ig_death_dt_evidence": "ig_death_evidence"

nlpql_libraries.name: ifu_information
